subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Hearken unto My call from this Prison wherein I remain solitary amidst Mine enemies, and find none to befriend Me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی اسمع ندائی من هذا السجن الذی بقیت فریدا بین الاعدا و لن اجد لنفسی
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
